events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six trips around the sun for Ringo Starr! From the Cavern Club to global superstardom, his beat defined a generation. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the legendary Brian May! His Red Special has given us some of the most iconic guitar riffs in history. What's your all-time favourite Queen track?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young for Sir Mick Jagger! The energy, the moves, the voice – he's still got it. What's the ultimate Stones anthem for you?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever. The first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star.' Ironic, isn't it?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 5, 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Debut
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! That album defined a generation and kickstarted Britpop. What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival of Music & Art took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love, Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. What an iconic moment in history. Which legendary performance stands out for you?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away on August 16, 1977; he would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91. His music continues to influence artists worldwide.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was tragically shot on September 7, 1996, and died on September 13, 1996; he would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 this year. His powerful lyrics and impact on hip-hop culture are still felt today.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970; he would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: On this day, we honour the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84. His innovative guitar work changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is almost as famous as the music within it! What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Hynde's Voice
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon whose voice and style have always been unmistakable.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It Liam
angles.copy: Our kid Liam Gallagher is 54 today! The voice of a generation, still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam lyric?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 51
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' on September 9, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-one years ago, John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with its message of peace and unity. What does it mean to you?

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple released the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple dropped a device that changed how we listen to music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to thrilling car chases, 007 has been a British institution for decades. Who's your favourite Bond?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles, would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His vision for peace and his incredible music continue to inspire.
